stemHtml: A scheduled flight is delayed about 3 hours due to maintenance. During this time, the Outside Air Temperature increases significantly. What impact does this temperature change have on VMCG?

options.a: V<sub>MCG</sub> decreases, due to the decreasing thrust.
options.b: V<sub>MCG </sub>decreases due to the increasing density.
options.c: V<sub>MCG</sub> remains constant for the same configuration.
options.d: V<sub>MCG</sub> increases due to decreasing rudder effectiveness.
